---
name: Skill request
about: Propose a new reusable skill or improvement to an existing skill
title: "Skill: "
labels: skill, proposal
---

## Goal

What workflow or capability should this skill help with?

## Intended users

Who would use it and in what downstream project context?

## Expected outputs

What files, decisions, templates, or checks should it produce?

## Success criteria

How should maintainers know the skill works?

## References or examples

Link related workflows, docs, or prior art.
